description: Per-slot and per-session budget caps with auto-throttle, hard stops, cost projections, and burn-down visualization. Extends existing CostEvent + UsageSummary infrastructure. BudgetService actor manages monitoring daemon.
goals: Budget caps per-slot and per-session with configurable thresholds
Auto-throttle at warning, auto-pause at hard cap

user_stories.title: BudgetConfig + BudgetAlert GRDB models
user_stories.description: New GRDB Records with migration. BudgetConfig: id, sessionId (FK), slotId (FK?, null=session-level), budgetCents (Int, default 2500), warningThresholdPct (Int, default 80), hardStopEnabled (Bool), throttleEnabled (Bool), dailyLimitCents (Int?), perStoryLimitCents (Int?), timestamps. BudgetAlert: id, budgetConfigId (FK), alertType (BudgetAlertType enum: warning, hard_stop, daily_exceeded, story_exceeded, projection_exceeded), currentSpendCents, budgetCents, percentUsed (Double), message, acknowledged (Bool), createdAt. BudgetRepository actor with CRUD + fetch_alerts_for_config.

user_stories.title: BudgetService actor — cost monitoring daemon
user_stories.description: New actor BudgetService. Wire into CostEventRepository.recordUsage — after every cost insert, call BudgetService.checkBudget(slotId). Check flow: 1) Fetch BudgetConfig for slot (fall back to session-level). 2) Calculate total spend (CostEventRepository.summaryForSlot). 3) Compare against thresholds. 4) At warning: create BudgetAlert, post notification via NotificationCenter. 5) At hard stop: create alert + pause slot via CockpitLifecycleManager (slot running → paused). 6) Daily limit: track daily aggregates, reset check at midnight. Wire into CockpitViewModel — subscribe to budget alerts, show in UI. Add to existing cost polling loop (5s).
tests: monitoring fires on each cost event

user_stories.title: Cost projection engine
user_stories.description: BudgetService.getProjection(sessionId) → CostProjection. CostProjection struct: currentSpend, burnRateCentsPerHour (calculated from time elapsed + total spend), projectedTotal (extrapolate to estimated completion), timeToExhaustionMinutes (budget / burn rate), overBudget (Bool). Projection methods: linear (time-based), story-based (cost/story × remaining), weighted blend. Emit projection_exceeded alert if projectedTotal > budget. Recalculate on every cost event. Expose to CockpitViewModel for UI.
tests: story-based projection adjusts for varying costs
projection alert fires when over trajectory

user_stories.title: Throttle mechanism
user_stories.description: BudgetService.applyThrottle(slotId, level: ThrottleLevel). ThrottleLevel enum: none, delay (2x loop sleep), suggest_downgrade (log suggestion to switch model), pause (auto-pause slot). BudgetService.autoThrottle(slotId): check → apply appropriate level. On warning threshold → delay. On 90% → suggest_downgrade. On 100% → pause. Throttle reversible — if projection improves (spend slows), auto-release. New field on AppState.dashboard: slotThrottleLevels [Int: ThrottleLevel] for UI display. Show throttle indicator on slot card.

user_stories.title: Budget dashboard SwiftUI views
user_stories.description: New views in CockpitModeView: 1) BudgetBarView — horizontal bar showing spend vs budget (green/yellow/red gradient). Session-level and per-slot bars. 2) BurnRateView — text display: $/hour, $/story. 3) ProjectionChartView — SwiftUI Chart with actual spend line + projected line + budget cap line. 4) CostBreakdownView — per-provider/model pie chart using existing breakdownForSession. 5) AlertHistoryView — list of BudgetAlerts with timestamps + acknowledge button. 6) BudgetConfigEditorView — sheet for editing caps, thresholds, enable/disable toggles. Integrate into cockpit header alongside existing SessionCostSummaryView.

user_stories.title: Budget presets
user_stories.description: BudgetPreset struct: name, budgetCents, warningPct, hardStop, throttle, dailyLimit, suggestedModel. Built-in presets: Frugal ($5, Sonnet-only), Standard ($25, mixed), Performance ($100, Opus allowed), Unlimited (monitoring only, no caps). BudgetPresetPicker SwiftUI view — shown in cockpit activation dialog. Custom presets saved in .crossroads/budget-presets.json. Preset applied automatically when session activates via ConductorService.
